# Evan

> Personal website and technical blog by Evan covering frontend development, React, TypeScript, web performance, deployment, and open source engineering.

## Main sections

- [Home](https://evanwu.dev/)
- [About](https://evanwu.dev/about)
- [Projects](https://evanwu.dev/projects)
- [Articles](https://evanwu.dev/articles)
- [Photography](https://evanwu.dev/photography)
- [Uses](https://evanwu.dev/uses)

## Featured articles

- [What changed in Next.js 16?](https://evanwu.dev/articles/next-16)
- [How to migrate Next.js to Cloudflare](https://evanwu.dev/articles/migrate-nextjs-to-cloudflare)
- [TanStack Start vs Next.js](https://evanwu.dev/articles/tanstack-start-vs-next)
- [How to create digital credentials with Solana Attestation Service](https://evanwu.dev/articles/how-to-create-digital-credentials)
- [Web performance optimization](https://evanwu.dev/articles/web-performance-optimization)

## Notes for language and structure

- English is the default language.
- Chinese content is available under the `/zh/` path.
- Article pages include structured data, canonical URLs, and social metadata.
